# PDF Compatibility Checklist

Use this short checklist when adding or updating fixture PDFs:

- Open the file in PDF Annotator, Chrome/Edge, Acrobat, and another independent reader where possible.
- Check that unsupported annotations remain visible, but read-only.
- Check that editable annotations save and reopen in at least one other reader.
- Check `Save`, `Save As`, `Download copy`, and hidden-annotation `Print`.
- Scrub personal metadata and visible personal information before committing.
